eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Fayette; Ohio; Daviess; Madison; Franklin, KY; at 8:33 PM on APR 20, 2019 Effective until 8:48 PM. Message from DASDEC.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System. This is only a test No action is needed. This is only a test.
